message:
Implement replica-serve-stale-data parity gap

- Adds replica_serve_stale_data to ServerState.
- Wires replica-serve-stale-data via CONFIG SET and CONFIG GET.
- Adds stale data enforcement gate in execute_frame_internal: rejects non-permitted commands with MASTERDOWN when replica link is down.
- Implements stale_replica_blocks_reads_when_configured integration test.
